n: Book 1, Chapter 10: Keepers of the History

steps.t: Pethebir is at the libraries of Dol Amroth. Lothíriel believes the best way to prepare for the threat of the Corsairs of Umbar is to learn as much abo…
Pethebir has given you the names of several scholars who may be able to help you.
Pethebir is at the libraries of Dol Amroth. Lothíriel believes the best way to prepare for the threat of the Corsairs of Umbar is to learn as much abo…
Lothíriel is in the Great Hall of Dol Amroth. You have learned that Lothíriel is unhappily betrothed to her cousin Boromir, and should tell her of her…
